title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Calcutta

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Calcutta
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IIM Calcutta. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About IIM Calcutta:
IIM Calcutta is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Calcutta!
